bead.title: design: create SD-019-agent-evaluation.md (comparison, grading, replay architecture)
bead.description: FEAT-019 is P1 and complex (dispatch same prompt to multiple harnesses, capture structured outputs, grading, replay), but has no Solution Design. TP-019 cannot be authored until the architecture is defined. Decide: use SD-019 slot (currently multi-project-server-topology — rename that SD to SD-019-multi-project-server-topology is fine but causes confusion) OR allocate a new SD number. Recommended: SD-023-agent-evaluation.md because SD-019 is already taken by multi-project topology.
bead.acceptance: SD-023 (or equivalent) written covering: comparison arm isolation; grading rubric and scoring pipeline; replay source-of-truth (session logs vs evidence bundles); relationship to 'ddx agent compare/benchmark/quorum' commands already implemented. Linked from FEAT-019.md and TP-019.

governing.title: Feature: DDx Agent Evaluation and Prompt Comparison
